test_cases.input: I have a mild sore throat and runny nose for 2 days.
I have a mild headache after a long day and I can still do normal activities.
My lower back hurts after lifting something heavy yesterday.
I burn when I pee and I’m going more frequently for 2 days.
I’ve been coughing for 4 days with a mild fever (37.8°C).
I have sudden crushing chest pain and I’m sweating a lot.
I suddenly can’t move my right arm well and my speech feels slurred.
I have shortness of breath even when resting.
My 2-month-old baby has a fever of 38.8°C and is unusually sleepy.
I have a rash and my lips feel swollen and I’m wheezing.
Can you prescribe antibiotics for my cough?
I have a tight chest and I’m pretty sure it’s anxiety. Should I ignore it?
I feel weird and dizzy but I can’t explain it well.
I have severe abdominal pain that started suddenly and is getting worse quickly.
I think I might be pregnant and I’m having vaginal bleeding and dizziness.
I have a fever of 39°C and chills for 2 days.
I have a mild cough and no fever, just a bit tired.
I’ve had diarrhea and vomiting since yesterday and can’t keep fluids down.
I have a sore throat and difficulty swallowing but no fever.
I twisted my ankle and it’s swollen but I can still walk.
I have tooth cavity
I suddenly developed a very severe headache unlike anything before.
I have a new mole with irregular borders and changing color.
I feel very thirsty, dizzy, and haven’t urinated much today.
I think I might have cancer because I found a lump that is growing.
